definitions.text: Less important or less noticeable in a scene or system.
examples: The antivirus program runs on a background thread.

definitions.text: One's social heritage, or previous life; what one did in the past.
examples: The lawyer had a background in computer science.

definitions.text: A part of the picture that depicts scenery to the rear or behind the main subject; context.
An extra who appears in the background, with no speaking role.
To put in a position that is not prominent.
To gather and provide background information (on).
simple past and past participle of backgrind
